purpose: Horizontally swipeable container that displays one item at a time with paging dots. Used for showcasing related images, cards, or KPIs.
whenToUse: Hero images on an overview page
A sequence of equivalent items where the user reviews one at a time
Mobile-first layouts where horizontal scroll is natural
whenNotToUse: When all items must be visible simultaneously — use a grid of Cards
For navigation — use Tabs or IconTabBar
When item order matters and users must compare — use Table or Card grid
For more than ~7 items — users lose context
doRules: Show paging dots so users can see total count
Set itemHeight large enough that content is readable on first slide
dontRules: Do not auto-rotate — let users control pace
Do not use Carousel for primary navigation

layoutGuidance.placement: Place Carousel inside a compatible container (DynamicPage, Panel, Card).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense or collapse — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern (Popover, Dialog) on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for container — see SAP Fiori a11y docs.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
